biological_replicate: human podocytes and smooth muscle cells
experimental_design: culturing kidney podocytes and smooth muscle cells on 3-D biomimetic surfaces
Here, the authors show that culturing kidney podocytes or smooth muscle cells on 3-D biomimetic surfaces results in phenotypic changes.
factor_value: we find that information from cell shape can be resolved from mechanical signals through integrin β3 signaling pathway.
